open_url_hint: Paste an http(s) direct link, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8000/video.mp4
open_url_invalid: Enter a URL starting with http:// or https://
lead_tooltip: How far ahead of the playhead AI stocks restored frames for hard segments.
clip_length_tooltip:
Consecutive frames BasicVSR++ processes per batch. Shorter responds faster
and may jitter more; longer is steadier but first-batch latency is higher (TRT cap 180).
max_regions_tooltip: Max mosaic regions restored in the same frame. Higher values multiply cost.
cold_start_tooltip: After seeking, play original frames first; AI starts this many seconds ahead.
target_fps_tooltip:
Original = source rate; 30/60 = pick the best 1/N temporal downsample so the
effective rate is nearest the target (never upsamples; 30fps source + 30 stays full rate).
compile_running: Compiling acceleration engines {step}/{total}… (first time, may take minutes)
compile_prompt: First run needs to compile demosaic engines for your GPU (a few minutes)
